name: Chicago Avenue Garage
description_short: Chicago Avenue Garage FCU is a small, member-owned credit union serving employees and families of Chicago Avenue Garage with savings accounts and personal loans.
description_long: Chicago Avenue Garage Federal Credit Union is a not-for-profit financial cooperative located in Chicago, Illinois. Established to serve the specific community of Chicago Avenue Garage workers and their families, the credit union operates as a member-owned institution governed by elected volunteer board members and a supervisory committee. The organization emphasizes personal relationships and individualized financial guidance for its membership base. The credit union offers a focused product lineup including unsecured loans, secured loans at 12% interest, Christmas loans ($1,000-$2,000 for 10 months), short-term emergency loans ($500 maximum for 6 months at 25%), and savings accounts. All savings accounts are insured up to $250,000 by the National Credit Union Administration (NCUA). Loan applications require downloading a form and submitting via email, with approval processed by staff. Chicago Avenue Garage FCU distinguishes itself through its hyper-local membership requirement and personal service model. The institution operates with limited hours (Monday-Friday, 10:00 AM-2:30 PM, closed the last two working days of each month) and maintains direct personal contact with members by name and voice. The credit union's volunteer governance structure and cooperative model reflect its commitment to member benefit rather than investor profit. This is a highly specialized financial institution suitable only for existing employees of Chicago Avenue Garage and their eligible family members. The limited hours, small loan caps (especially for emergency loans at $500), and restricted membership significantly limit its accessibility to the general public. Members seeking broader financial services or larger loan amounts would need to supplement with additional banking relationships.
services: Short-term emergency loans ($500 maximum for 6 months at 25%)
Savings accounts with competitive interest rates
NCUA deposit insurance up to $250,000 per account
Online loan application submission via email
Member financial counseling and decision assistance
pros: All savings accounts insured to $250,000 by NCUA for complete deposit protection
Christmas loans available at reasonable rates for seasonal borrowing needs ($1,000-$2,000)
Competitive interest rates on savings accounts as stated on website
Personal service model with staff who know members by name, face, and voice
Volunteer board and supervisory committee governance ensures member-focused operations
Not-for-profit cooperative structure means surplus returns to members, not shareholders
Accessible to immediate family members of current employees, expanding membership beyond direct workers
cons: Severely restricted membership—only Chicago Avenue Garage employees and immediate family members eligible
Very limited operating hours (Monday-Friday, 10:00 AM-2:30 PM) with additional closure for last 2 working days of month
Emergency loans capped at only $500 maximum, insufficient for most genuine emergencies
Short-term emergency loans carry 25% interest rate, which is relatively high
Loan application process requires manual form download and email submission with unclear approval timeline
best_for: Chicago Avenue Garage employees seeking personal savings accounts with NCUA protection
Employees' spouses and immediate family members needing seasonal Christmas loans
Members wanting personalized financial service from a volunteer-led cooperative institution
Workers seeking an alternative to traditional banks with direct personal relationships
diagnosis: Chicago Avenue Garage FCU is best for employees of Chicago Avenue Garage and their immediate family members who value personal service and cooperative ownership over product breadth. The critical caveat is the highly restricted membership eligibility—this institution is not accessible to the general public and only serves a specific workplace community, making it unsuitable for most consumers seeking credit union services.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
